Implemented the next `chain:runtime` slice by turning `myosu-runtime` into a real workspace member in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/Cargo.toml#L1), adding the new runtime package manifest in [crates/myosu-chain/runtime/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/Cargo.toml#L1) and WASM build hook in [crates/myosu-chain/runtime/build.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/build.rs#L1), and replacing the dead subtensor runtime with a minimal FRAME runtime plus runtime APIs in [crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/lib.rs#L1). I also added the runtime-side preset hook in [crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/chain_spec.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/chain_spec.rs#L1) and updated [Cargo.lock](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/Cargo.lock#L1) for the new dependency graph.

I wrote the implementation-stage artifacts in [outputs/chain/runtime/implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/implementation.md#L1), [outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md#L1), and [outputs/chain/runtime/integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM71ZMKXKTA8K2MZZG2XYZGP/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/integration.md#L1). `cargo metadata --offline --no-deps` and `rustfmt --check` passed; full `cargo check -p myosu-runtime` is still blocked in this sandbox by dependency acquisition, with the first offline miss reported as `finality-grandpa v0.16.3`, so I documented that boundary instead of claiming a false green build. I did not hand-author `quality.md` or `promotion.md` because this stage assigns those to the Quality Gate and Review stage.
